title: psilanthus wightianus
intro: Psilanthus wightianus is a plant species, specifically a type of tree, native to India and Sri Lanka. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psilanthus wightianus include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce swelling, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it a useful remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Psilanthus wightianus can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
